title: Cinematic Night Rain Portrait
desc: Generate rain-soaked night portraits with reflective surfaces and high micro-contrast.
prompt_template: Portrait of {subject} standing in {city} after rain. Use {lens} composition, {lighting}, wet pavement reflections, and {color_grade}. Add fine mist and shallow depth of field.
author: visual-recipe-lab
final_prompt: Portrait of a lone cyclist standing in Seoul alley after rain. Use 85mm close composition, side-key magenta cyan practical lighting, wet pavement reflections, and high-contrast teal-orange cinematic color grade. Add fine mist and shallow depth of field.
